title: BasicallyGraves
description: an entity based grave mod inspired by content SMP
body:
## This mod adds entity based graves
### unlike most grave mods that use blocks.

- the grave entity is about .5 blocks wide and 1 block tall _(not completely accurate)_
- the grave entity is completely immune to any non-player caused damage, such as fire or cactus damage
- the grave entity has 1 health, meaning it can easily be killed with a simple punch
- the grave entity drops its items on death, with a small amount of random velocity (~1 block spread)

# 
## **pros:**
- Entity based graves are far less buggy and less likely to cause issues, as they dont need physical space to be created
- entity based graves can be moved around
- if a block based grave is crerated in the air, getting it can be problematic, an entity based grave however will simply fall to the ground

## **cons:**
- currently modded slot support is missing, and there are no plans to implement it
- im new to entities so currently the graves do not have an inventory menu, they simply drop the items on death
- the grave entity currently does **not** store experience points
